title: Strengthen in-depth cooperation between the two parties - Mr. Guo from Hengli Petrochemical visited Tianhui Plastics Group
contentHtml:
On April 7, in order to strengthen the in-depth cooperation between the two parties, Mr. Guo and Manager Wu of Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) Chemical Co., Ltd. traveled thousands of miles to visit Tianhui Plastics Group. The company’s chairman Zeng Shengwen and relevant responsible persons gave a warm reception.

Spring returns to the earth and everything revives. General Manager Guo and Manager Wu of the Resin Department of Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) Chemical Co., Ltd. traveled thousands of miles to visit Tianhui Plastic Group. This is the first batch of customers that the company welcomed after resuming work and production during the Spring Festival. The company attaches great importance to it and Chairman Zeng Shengwen warmly received it. Deputy general managers Yue Yunbo and Zhao Wentao, assistant general manager Ma Jinshu, and ministers Qiu Long, Li Chuang, Yang Zhunsheng, and Ma Xiaohui participated in the reception and exchange. The two parties exchanged experiences and opinions on the sales situation during the epidemic, and planned and looked forward to future cooperation plans. The exchange between the two parties was a complete success!

Hengli Group is an international enterprise with diversified development such as oil refining, petrochemicals, new polyester materials, and textiles, and diversified development in trade, finance, and thermal power. It is one of the world's top 500 companies. This time, the leaders of Hengli Group visited our company to lay a solid foundation for promoting friendly cooperation between the two parties.
titleZh: 加强双方深度合作——恒力石化郭总到访天晖塑料集团
contentHtmlZh:
4月7日，为加强双方深度合作，恒力石化(大连)化工有限公司郭总、吴经理一行不远千里到访天晖塑料集团，公司董事长曾胜文及相关负责人作了热情接待。

春回大地，万物复苏。恒力石化(大连)化工有限公司树脂部郭总，吴经理不远千里到访天晖塑料集团。这是春节复工复产后公司迎来的第一批客户，公司上下高度重视，董事长曾胜文热情接待。副总经理岳云波、赵文涛，总经理助理马金树，部长邱龙、李闯、杨准生、马晓慧参与接待交流。双方就疫情期间的销售情况交换了心得与看法，对未来合作计划进行了规划展望，双方交流取得了圆满的成功！

恒力集团是以炼油、石化、聚酯新材料、纺织为主业，贸易、金融、热电等多元化发展的国际型企业，是世界500强企业。此次恒力集团一行领导到访我公司参观考察为促成双方友好合作夯实基础。
